seoTitle: Mount Murray vs Mount Olive — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Murray and Mount Olive. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Murray vs Mount Olive: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Murray and Mount Olive.
heading: Mount Murray vs Mount Olive — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Murray, New South Wales and Mount Olive, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Olive has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Mount Murray (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Murray or Mount Olive safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Murray has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Mount Olive scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Murray scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Olive scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Murray or Mount Olive?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Olive has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
